Description

  • Uses of SpatialView in microui.component

    Subclasses of SpatialView in microui.component
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Button
    Represents a clickable button component with text and/or image content.
    class 
    CheckBox
    A CheckBox component that represents a binary state (checked or unchecked).
    final class 
    Knob
    A circular knob control for selecting values within a range.
    final class 
    LabeledCheckBox
    A composite component that combines a CheckBox with a TextView to create a labeled checkbox.
    final class 
    MenuButton
    A hierarchical menu button component that can contain both plain items and sub-menus.
    class 
    Scroll
    A scrollbar component with a draggable thumb for selecting values within a range.
    class 
    Slider
    A slider component for selecting values within a linear range.
    final class 
    TextArea
    A multi-line text editing component with support for selection, scrolling, copy/paste, undo/redo, and keyboard navigation.
    final class 
    TextField
    A single-line text input field with support for text editing, selection, copy/paste, undo/redo, validation, and password masking.
    final class 
    TextView
    A component for displaying text with automatic resizing, alignment, and clipping options.

  • Uses of SpatialView in microui.core

    Subclasses of SpatialView in microui.core
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractButton
    Abstract base class for all button-like components in the microui framework.
    class 
    GraphicsBuffer
    A container for managing off-screen graphics buffers with composable buffered views.
    class 
    ImageBuffer
    A spatial view component for displaying and manipulating images with color tinting.
    class 
    LinearRangeControl
    Abstract base class for linear range control components (sliders, scrollbars).
    class 
    RangeControl
    Abstract base class for range control components that allow selecting a numeric value within a specified range.
    Constructors in microui.core with parameters of type SpatialView
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    GraphicsBuffer(SpatialView spatialView)
    Constructs a GraphicsBuffer with position and dimensions from a SpatialView.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Component
    Abstract base class for all interactive UI components in the microui framework.
    final class 
    Container
    Container component for organizing and managing GUI components.
    class 
    ContentView
    Abstract base class for all GUI components that can be displayed and interacted with.
    Methods in microui.core.base with parameters of type SpatialView
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final void
    SpatialView.setBoundsFrom(SpatialView other)
    Sets all bounds from another SpatialView.
    final void
    SpatialView.setConstrainConfigFrom(SpatialView other)
    Copies constraint configuration from another SpatialView.
    final void
    SpatialView.setHeightFrom(SpatialView other)
    Sets the height from another SpatialView.
    final void
    SpatialView.setMaxHeightFrom(SpatialView other)
    Sets the maximum height from another SpatialView.
    final void
    SpatialView.setMaxSizeFrom(SpatialView other)
    Sets the maximum size from another SpatialView.
    final void
    SpatialView.setMaxWidthFrom(SpatialView other)
    Sets the maximum width from another SpatialView.
    final void
    SpatialView.setMinHeightFrom(SpatialView other)
    Sets the minimum height from another SpatialView.
    final void
    SpatialView.setMinMaxSizeFrom(SpatialView other)
    Sets both minimum and maximum size from another SpatialView.
    final void
    SpatialView.setMinSizeFrom(SpatialView other)
    Sets the minimum size from another SpatialView.
    final void
    SpatialView.setMinWidthFrom(SpatialView other)
    Sets the minimum width from another SpatialView.
    final void
    SpatialView.setPositionFrom(SpatialView other)
    Sets the position from another SpatialView.
    final void
    SpatialView.setSizeFrom(SpatialView other)
    Sets the size from another SpatialView.
    final void
    SpatialView.setSpatialConfigFrom(SpatialView other)
    Copies all spatial configuration from another SpatialView.
    final void
    SpatialView.setWidthFrom(SpatialView other)
    Sets the width from another SpatialView.
    final void
    SpatialView.setXFrom(SpatialView other)
    Sets the x-coordinate from another SpatialView.
    final void
    SpatialView.setYFrom(SpatialView other)
    Sets the y-coordinate from another SpatialView.

    Constructor

    Constructor

    Constructs an AbstractEventSystem for the specified SpatialView.
